# Morning Ultimate Palo Alto

Morning Ultimate is a beginner-friendly Ultimate Frisbee pickup game in Palo Alto, California.

The game happens every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday from 7:00am to 8:00am, rain or shine.

Location: Mayfield Soccer Complex, at Page Mill Road and El Camino Real in Palo Alto.

New players are welcome. The group does not play with subs, so everyone who shows up can play the whole game.

Official listing: https://pickupultimate.com/games/paloaltoultimate

Mailing list contact: jpickupultimate@frzb.org
